textByHash.2f6c4617d63a8ff7c2da84d25aeaf0069258bc18: No! This is the one, singular, special tree!
textByHash.6867ae506e74d1e121f1389eb6ee16afd0a6c564: No, absolutely not! I know where to meet Fabia and I wouldn't miss any opportunity to do so!
textByHash.78bcdd3ad0a029320634d71890577f8d6a4229e1: The magic trees? Of course! How could I have been so stupid! Thank you, iknami. I'll head over right away!
textByHash.9353baf8ac850a2d5c53ff446e6df3110334e3c6: Hmm... I'll think about it, but for now, I'll wait here a while longer.
textByHash.94bbbfd515f38d699cdceeea49e2fd524c8ef902: I can't believe she's done this.
textByHash.9acb58cfd12ebd28239e511ad14ed6e4e0d13706: Fabia! She asked me to meet her, and I quote, 'by the special tree'. You may notice that she isn't here! I've been waiting for hours!
textByHash.9ba847f4055231f6d6c3b37ff7d2a1acea64b7c5: Hello again, iknami! Thank you for helping us find each other!
textByHash.ec7d3c507eeddf96450e1e54b98e2beb8277daad: And Fabia would find herself at the wrong tree in this scenario?
textByHash.f2a8ef0092cdda8d0da3426364735311ef2ebbfa: I know her too well. She wouldn't be delayed coming to see me.
textByHash.f6b041e37e8e3a2c083b88aa5b7626746595b87e: This was the tree where we first met. It was a lovely day! A botanical tour of the rainforest, but the only thing I found myself looking at was her...
